content.speakerText: It's working! Thanks so much for your help, Sarah.
content.speakerTextCn: 好了！太感谢你帮忙了，莎拉。

options.text: You should have done it yourself.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No problem, anytime!' 是对真诚感谢的自然、友好回应，符合英语口语习惯。其他选项要么冷漠（I'm busy）、责备（You should have...）或推卸责任（That's not my job），都不符合表达感谢后的积极回应语境。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you showing me how to fix this.
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很感谢你教我怎么修。

options.text: Anytime, happy to help new folks!
I didn't have time to teach you.
It was too complicated for you.
Why didn't you read the manual?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Anytime, happy to help new folks!' 体现了乐于助人且回应了对方的感激之情。其他选项都带有负面、指责或消极语气，违背了表达感谢后应保持积极互动的社交规范。

content.speakerText: Thank you for staying late to finish the report with me.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你留下来陪我完成报告。

options.text: I didn't want to do it anyway.
You should have finished it faster.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'It was nothing, really.' 是英语中常见的谦逊回应，用于淡化自己的付出，同时礼貌接受感谢。其他选项要么消极、指责，要么冷漠，不符合感恩互动的积极语境。

content.template: Thanks so much for ___ your help!
content.hint: 表达感谢时，'for' 后接名词性物主代词修饰 'help'
content.knowledgePoint: 介词后接物主代词（for your help）

content.template: I really appreciate you ___ me how to fix this.
content.hint: appreciate 后接动名词形式，表示感激某人做了某事

content.template: Thank you for ___ me with this project.
content.hint: 表达感谢时常用 'thank you for + 动名词' 结构
content.knowledgePoint: thank you for + 动名词（固定搭配）

content.speakerText: It's working! Thanks so much for your help, Sarah.
content.speakerTextCn: 好了！太感谢你帮忙了，莎拉。
expectedAnswers: You're welcome—I'm glad I could help!
Sure thing! Happy to be of assistance.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应了感谢，避免冷漠或拒绝
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无严重错误
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常回应习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'anytime', 'glad', 'sure thing'

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you showing me how to fix this.
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很感谢你教我怎么修。
expectedAnswers: Anytime, happy to help new folks!
Of course! I remember when I was learning too.
You're welcome—it's rewarding to see you learn!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方的学习感激，体现支持态度
语言准确性：动名词结构使用正确，无语法错误
表达自然度：语气真诚、亲切，符合职场互助语境
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'anytime', 'happy to help', 'you're welcome' 等核心表达

content.speakerText: Thank you for bringing me coffee this morning—it really made my day.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你今天早上给我带咖啡，这真的让我的一天变好了。
expectedAnswers: Oh, it was nothing! I'm glad you liked it.
You're so welcome—I always bring an extra cup!
Happy to do it! Let me know if you need another one.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应感谢，传递温暖和善意
语言准确性：句型结构完整，时态和搭配正确
表达自然度：是否使用了地道、非机械的口语表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'you're welcome', 'glad', 'happy to' 等感谢回应关键词
